User.title: User Profile
User.description: Information about a registered user (coach, trainee, or admin).

uid.description: The unique Firebase Auth identifier for the user.

status.description: The approval status of the user account.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user account was registered.

Program.title: Training & Diet Program
Program.description: A coach-assigned fitness training program and diet schedule.

id.description: The program ID, matching the trainee ID.

coachId.description: The ID of the assigning coach.

workoutDays.description: List of workout days with exercise routines.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp of the last plan update.

ProgressLog.title: Progress Log
ProgressLog.description: A logged activity or workout day completion record filled by the trainee.

id.description: The unique progress log entry ID.

Message.title: Chat Message
Message.description: An individual instant chat message exchanged between a coach and a trainee.

senderId.description: The user ID of the sender.

Chat.title: Chat Summary
Chat.description: Metadata summarizing active chat channels and latest activity.

id.description: The ID of the chat channel.

participants.description: User IDs involved in the chat.

lastMessage.description: The snippet of the last message sent.

lastMessageAt.description: The timestamp of the last message sent.

AppNotification.title: Application Notification
AppNotification.description: An alert notification pushed to a user's notification center.

body.description: Detail body text of the alert.

read.description: Whether the notification has been read.

ExerciseVideo.title: Exercise Video
ExerciseVideo.description: An exercise video showing the technique for a workout exercise.

users.description: Access to registered user profile documents.

programs.description: Access to training and nutrition program sheets.

progress.description: Access to trainee workouts completion logging history.

messages.description: Access to chat dialogue messages records.

chats.description: Access to user chat summaries metadata.

notifications.description: Access to trainee alert message boxes.

exercise_videos.description: Access to stored video demonstration guides.
